2605.22297.title: One LR Doesn't Fit All: Heavy-Tail Guided Layerwise Learning Rates for LLMs
2605.22297.paper_summary: Learning rate configuration is a fundamental aspect of modern deep learning. The prevailing practice of applying a uniform learning rate across all layers overlooks the structural heterogeneity of Transformers, potentially limiting their effectiveness as the backbone of Large Language Models (LLMs). In this paper, we introduce Layerwise Learning Rate (LLR), an adaptive scheme that assigns distinct learning rates to individual Transformer layers. Our method is grounded in Heavy-Tailed Self-Regularization (HT-SR) theory, which characterizes the empirical spectral density (ESD) of weight correlation matrices to quantify heavy-tailedness. Layers with weaker heavy-tailedness are assigned larger learning rates to accelerate their training, while layers with stronger heavy-tailedness receive smaller learning rates. By tailoring learning rates in this manner, LLR promotes balanced training across layers, leading to faster convergence and improved generalization. Extensive experiments across architectures (from LLaMA to GPT-nano), optimizers (AdamW and Muon), and parameter scales (60M-1B) demonstrate that LLR achieves up to 1.5x training speedup and outperforms baselines, notably raising average zero-shot accuracy from 47.09% to 49.02%. A key advantage of LLR is its low tuning overhead: it transfers nearly optimal LR settings directly from the uniform baseline. Code is available at https://github.com/hed-ucas/Layer-wise-Learning-Rate.
2605.22297.paper_summary_zh: 學習率配置是現代深度學習的一個基本方面。對所有層應用統一學習率的普遍做法忽視了Transformer的結構異質性，可能限制了它們作為大型語言模型（LLMs）骨幹的有效性。在本文中，我們介紹了逐層學習率（LLR），這是一種自適應方案，為個別Transformer層分配不同的學習率。我們的方法基於重尾自正則化（HT-SR）理論，該理論通過量化重尾性來表徵權重相關矩陣的經驗譜密度（ESD）。重尾性較弱的層被分配較大的學習率以加速其訓練，而重尾性較強的層則接收較小的學習率。通過這種方式量身定制學習率，LLR促進了層之間的平衡訓練，導致更快的收斂和改進的泛化。對各種架構（從LLaMA到GPT-nano）、優化器（AdamW和Muon）以及參數規模（60M-1B）的廣泛實驗表明，LLR實現了高達1.5倍的訓練加速，並且超越了基準，顯著將平均零-shot準確率從47.09%提高到49.02%。LLR的一個主要優勢是其低調整開銷：它幾乎直接從統一基準轉移了最佳學習率設置。代碼可在https://github.com/hed-ucas/Layer-wise-Learning-Rate獲得。
2605.22297.author: Di He et.al.
2605.22297.authors: Di He, Songjun Tu, Keyu Wang, Lu Yin, Shiwei Liu
